column8: Boris (to run) to the bathroom two minutes ago.
column9: He just (to have) time to take a cold shower last evening.
column10: He (to be) in a hurry to catch the 8 am train last morning.
column11: Yesterday he (to meet) three other boys from his group.
column12: They (to get off) the train ten minutes ago.
column13: They (to find) themselves on the shore of a large lake an hour ago.
column14: The boys (to spend) a lot of time there last month.
column16: You (to come) home at six o’clock yesterday.
column17: I (to drink) two cups of tea last morning.
column18: Last week she (to write) a funny story about her pet.
column19: You (to tell) your mother the truth about the money yesterday.
